name: Santana
bio: Santana's catalog still makes money because guitar-led crossover hits and multi-era recognition keep the recordings active across streaming and licensing channels.
notable_for: Latin-rock crossover and one of the biggest catalog revivals of the CD era.
career_highlight: Supernatural reset the commercial ceiling for the catalog and still anchors long-tail earnings.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Santana's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Santana's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
